title: mammillaria capensis
intro: Mammillaria capensis, also known as the rock star cactus or mountain star cactus, is a species of flowering cactus native to Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides in its stems. The health benefits of Mammillaria capensis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the stems are boiled in water to extract the medicinal compounds, or used as a tincture to create a concentrated herbal remedy.
